brief_summary: Horizontal bar chart of typical 65% case weights by material. Three bars: aluminium (~1.2 kg, ochre-accented as the reference/heaviest), polycarbonate (~0.7 kg), ABS (~0.65 kg). X-axis runs 0 to 1.2 kg with four tick marks. Bars are proportional to stated weights. A footer note clarifies the figures represent case-only mass without PCB or switches, and that brass weight inserts can increase aluminium boards further.
data_sources: apps/web/src/content/articles/case-materials-compared.mdx § 'Aluminium' — 'A CNC-machined aluminium 65% typically lands around 1.2 kg without PCB or switches'
